transcript:
CALLER: Namaste. Mujhe orthopaedic doctor se milna hai. Mere kamar mein bahut dard hai.
AGENT: Namaste ji. Zaroor help karenge. Aapka naam aur number?
CALLER: Savitabai Jadhav. 9823001122.
AGENT: Shukriya Savitabai ji. Dr. Pramod Joshi orthopaedics mein hain. Kal subah 9 baje ka slot available hai.
CALLER: Kal subah theek hai. Book kar dijiye.
AGENT: Ho gaya. Savitabai Jadhav, kal 9:00 AM, Dr. Pramod Joshi. SMS milega confirm karne ke liye. Kuch aur?
CALLER: Nahi, dhanyawaad.
